summary: Russian FPV drones struck two soldiers on motorcycles assaulting Ukrainian positions, while another Russian soldier pretending to surrender was killed by FPV drones after attempting to flee. Ukrainian forces from the 36th Marine Brigade survived a Russian FPV attack in the Kostiantinivka direction, with a drone detector alerting them at 0:11 in the footage. The 429th Achilles Brigade destroyed a rare Russian IMR-3 engineering vehicle near Vovchansk using coordinated FPV and bomber drones, and the "Yolka" anti-aircraft drone intercepted and destroyed a Ukrainian "Hornet" UAV, with another "Yolka" intercept causing a Ukrainian "Shark-M" UAV's parachute to deploy, allowing its capture by the 16th Special Purpose Brigade.
